summary: Comprehensive testing of AI Presentation Creator feature completed. All backend endpoints (11/11 tests) passed. Frontend UI testing verified all key features: AI generation, Save, Load, Present mode, and UI elements.
passed_tests: Backend: AI Presentation Generation - POST /api/ai/presentation/generate (200 OK, generates 4-6 slides)
Backend: AI Presentation Generation - Missing fields validation (422)
Backend: Create Presentation - POST /api/ai/presentations (200 OK)
Backend: List Presentations - GET /api/ai/presentations (200 OK)
Backend: Get Presentation by ID - GET /api/ai/presentations/{id} (200 OK)
Backend: Get Non-existent Presentation (404)
Backend: Update Presentation - PUT /api/ai/presentations/{id} (200 OK)
Backend: Update Non-existent Presentation (404)
Backend: Delete Presentation - DELETE /api/ai/presentations/{id} (200 OK)
Backend: Delete Non-existent Presentation (404)
Backend: Full CRUD Flow (Create -> Read -> Update -> Delete)
Frontend: Presentation Creator page loads correctly
Frontend: New button visible and functional
Frontend: Open button visible and functional
Frontend: Save button visible and functional
Frontend: Download button visible
Frontend: Help button visible
Frontend: Present button visible and functional
Frontend: AI Generation form with Topic, Subject, Grade fields
Frontend: Generate button triggers AI generation
Frontend: AI generates 6 slides with proper content
Frontend: Save dialog shows presentation name input
Frontend: Save persists presentation to database
Frontend: Load dialog shows saved presentations list
Frontend: Load retrieves presentation with all slides
Frontend: Present mode shows fullscreen presentation
Frontend: Theme selector with multiple themes
Frontend: Slide templates panel (Title, Content, Image layouts)
seed_data_creation: Created test presentations during testing (cleaned up after)
context_for_next_testing_agent: AI Presentation Creator feature fully implemented and tested. Backend endpoints: POST /api/ai/presentation/generate (AI generation), POST/GET/PUT/DELETE /api/ai/presentations (CRUD). Frontend at /presentations with full UI including AI generation form, save/load dialogs, present mode, theme selector, and slide editor. All features working correctly with Claude Sonnet 4 via emergentintegrations.

ai_presentation_generation.details: Generates 4-6 slides with titles, subtitles, content, and bullet points based on topic, subject, and grade level
